column8: EA TGQ codec YCbCr->RGB 16bpp 4:2:0 row converter; called only by DecodeMCU_YCbCr420_16bpp (0x004592ad). Port replaces entire TGQ stack with Windows Media Foundation per td5_fmv.c header
EA TGQ codec YCbCr->RGB 8bpp row converter; called only by DecodeMCU_YCbCr422_16bpp (0x004590bf). Port uses IMFSourceReader RGB32 output, no manual YUV->RGB
EA TGQ codec 32-byte pixel buffer copy; called only by BlitDecodedToSurface (0x0045bae0). Port has no DDraw blit path; MF decodes direct to D3D11 texture
EA TGQ codec YCbCr->RGB 16bpp 4:2:2 row converter; called only by DecodeMotionCompensatedFrame (0x0045b2b0). No port equivalent per td5_fmv.c arch divergence
EA TGQ codec 8-column IDCT butterfly stage; called by IDCTDecode16x16Block/DecodeJPEGFrame/DecodeJPEGMCU. Port has no IDCT path; MF handles full decode
